text:
It works now!

I still have suspend/resume issue. 

Feb 18 22:48:57 sphinx kernel: errors on pipe A
Feb 18 22:48:57 sphinx kernel: : 0x00000080[drm:gen8_de_irq_handler] Fault errors on pipe A
Feb 18 22:48:57 sphinx last message repeated 546 times

I remember it was triaged. Should I open new bug here?
